RECORD.TITLE: Calcium and mucus in cystic fibrosis
RECORD.ABSTRACT: The effects of calcium on the mucus of patients with cystic fibrosis were studied. Calcium increases the viscosity of the mucus secreted by the patients.

RECORD.TITLE: Mucus viscosity
RECORD.ABSTRACT: Mucus viscosity was measured in several cystic fibrosis patients. The mucus showed abnormal properties.

RECORD.TITLE: Calcium effects on viscosity
RECORD.EXTRACT: Calcium has strong effects on the viscosity of mucus. The effects of calcium were measured in mucus samples.

RECORD.TITLE: Lung infection
RECORD.ABSTRACT: Lung infection is a common complication in cystic fibrosis patients. Bacterial infection of the lung damages the respiratory system.
